one_time_description: Theft/misappropriation of assets at retail establishment; amount of loss cannot be reasonably determined
economic_notes: First Nation owns 100% of IIFN39 Holdings LP carrying on various economic development and commercial enterprises. Related party entities include Shoal Lake Lodge LP, Corridor Construction LP, Amik Barge LP, Ambe Arts and Crafts LP. Convenience store (Shoal Lake Landing) operated. Corridor Construction LP generated $221,068 revenue in 2022.
notes: Audit is qualified for four reasons: (1) tangible capital assets acquired prior to 1996 not recorded; (2) theft/misappropriation at retail store with undetermined loss amount; (3) business enterprises not assessed under PS 1300 for modified equity vs full consolidation; (4) no budget comparison presented in statements. Related party GBEs include Shoal Lake Lodge LP, Corridor Construction LP, Amik Barge LP, Ambe Arts and Crafts LP, and IIFN39 Holdings LP - none fully consolidated. Prior year audited by a different auditor. Long-term debt includes capital lease obligations of $977,855. annual_debt_service reflects only long-term debt principal repayments per cash flow; capital lease repayments of $329,180 are separate.
